violations.text: Chemical dispenser for sanitizer at 3 bay sink is not dispensing correct concentration of sanitizer. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Establishment is currently manually mixing sanitizer; service is scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). Water and chemical solution from dispenser was dispensing out hot. Sanitizer bay for 3 bay sink was manually mixed during time of inspection. Establishment to manually mix until sanitizer dispenser is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

French toast batter and hash were observed held at 59 and 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were placed under refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by live insect observed during time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to work in conjunction with pest control to eliminate pest issue. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The dry near back door was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. Food safety certificate current. FMC must re-instate. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Raw pooled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as deli turkey in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2024
Door handle for 2 door reach-in cooler in front area was observed held with duct tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary disposals. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as bacon in the 2 door glass refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC moved eggs to the bottom shelf at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was observed lower than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Establishment switched 3-bay sanitizer to bleach, and 3-bay sink was set up at the time of inspection. Dispenser is to be serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment must mark food items on menu that may be served undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2024
Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution was lacking a label at the 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
